title: Project Gutenberg Nonfiction
description: A source card for public-domain nonfiction and historical works from Project Gutenberg.
license: Public Domain in the U.S. / Project Gutenberg License

pages.text: Project Gutenberg is useful for older students who are ready for historical nonfiction, speeches, memoirs, science history, engineering texts, and public-domain classics. Many texts are older and may need vocabulary support, context, or excerpting.

Rights note: many Project Gutenberg works are not restricted by US copyright law, but the Project Gutenberg trademark and license text carry rules. For classroom mirroring, prefer verified public-domain works and preserve clear source attribution.
